title: vellozia verruculosa
intro: Vellozia verruculosa, also known as the 'toadstool plant', is a species of flowering plant in the family Velloziaceae. It is native to South America, particularly in Brazil and Peru. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, Vellozia verruculosa is often used to make teas and infusions, which are said to provide relief from coughs and congestion, as well as promote overall respiratory health.
